# Stage B+ training stack (CUDA pod).
#
# VERIFIED 2026-07-06 on the Stage B pod (1xH100, torch 2.8.0+cu128 image):
# the resolved set passed the B1 minimal run. Exact pins frozen in
# env/requirements-train.lock.txt — prefer the lockfile for reproduction.
# NOTE: transformers resolved to 5.x (major); code in src/subject uses the
# v5 API names (eval_strategy, processing_class, dtype=, warmup_steps).
#
# torch is preinstalled on most RunPod PyTorch images; only install it
# explicitly if you must, and match the image's CUDA build if you do.

torch>=2.4
transformers>=4.44
peft>=0.12
trl>=0.9
accelerate>=0.33
datasets>=2.20
bitsandbytes>=0.43
safetensors
sentencepiece
scikit-learn        # B2 localization probe
pandas
pyarrow
numpy
wandb               # live loss / token-count dashboard (plan E1)
pytest              # unit tests (tests/)

# Optional, only if the image supports them:
# flash-attn>=2.6
# deepspeed>=0.14   # Stage E1 only
